title: Squirrel Removal in Hewlett, NY | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Hewlett, Long Island. Humane trapping, exclusion, and attic cleanup. Serving Hewlett homes and businesses. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Squirrels in your Hewlett attic or crawl space can cause serious damage to insulation, wiring, and structural components. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Hewlett and the Five Towns area, combining humane trapping with permanent exclusion solutions. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges facing Long Island homeowners and deliver fast, effective results.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Nassau County communities like Hewlett, we combine local expertise with proven squirrel control methods. Our licensed professionals provide complete solutions including inspection, removal, entry point sealing, and damage repair—all backed by our satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Hewlett's tree-lined streets and mix of historic homes and waterfront properties near Hewlett Bay create ideal conditions for squirrel activity, especially during fall and winter months. From the classic residences near Hewlett Harbor to properties around the Woodmere Country Club area, our team is familiar with the architectural styles and common entry points that attract these persistent pests.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Hewlett?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Hewlett typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes inspection, humane trapping, exclusion work, and follow-up visits. We provide free estimates with transparent pricing before any work begins.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Hewlett homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter Hewlett homes through roof vents, soffit gaps, chimney caps, and damaged fascia boards. They can squeeze through openings as small as 1.5 inches and often exploit construction gaps in older homes. Our inspection identifies all current and potential entry points for complete exclusion.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Hewlett humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, approved trapping methods that comply with New York wildlife regulations. Squirrels are safely trapped and relocated according to state guidelines. We never use poisons or harmful methods, ensuring ethical treatment while solving your pest problem permanently.

faqs.question: What damage can squirrels cause in my Hewlett attic?
faqs.answer: Squirrels can cause extensive damage including chewed electrical wiring (fire hazard), destroyed insulation, contaminated areas from droppings and urine, damaged ductwork, and structural wood damage. They may also create noise disturbances and allow entry for other pests. Our team provides complete damage assessment and restoration services as part of the removal process.
